_comment: Manual batter-bat-side overrides for opponent batters whose NCAA roster data has a blank 'Bats' field. Keys are 'Last Name' or 'Full Name' as seen in PBP. Values: 'R', 'L', or 'S' (switch).
_comment_2: parse_pbp.py applies these as a last resort if the roster cache lookup fails (only for opp_bat side, never for pitcher-throws lookups). Update this file when you see a batter in the unresolved list from parse_pbp diagnostics — look up their bat side on the team's official roster page.
